trades.reasoning: Top screener score of 95 with RSI 68.6 firmly in bullish momentum zone (not yet overbought), MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram, and price 8% above SMA-20 — cleanest setup to deploy idle cash in today's risk-on environment.

decisions.briefing: Markets are solidly risk-on today with NASDAQ up 1.1% and S&P 500 gaining 0.6%, favoring momentum and growth positions. I'm deploying the remaining cash into FSLY, which leads the screener at score 95 with the best technical alignment among affordable tickers — RSI not yet overbought and MACD histogram accelerating. Existing positions hold steady: OLED continues to score 95 and shows a 1.2% gain on the day, so no sells are warranted.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities posted a broad rally on May 1, with the NASDAQ surging 1.1% and the S&P 500 advancing 0.6% as investor risk appetite rebounded. Technology and growth stocks led the charge, outperforming defensive sectors as macro uncertainty eased and buyers returned to higher-beta names. The divergence between NASDAQ and the S&P 500 signals that market participants are specifically rewarding innovation-driven and high-growth companies in this session.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市5月1日全面上漲，那斯達克指數勁升1.1%，標普500指數上漲0.6%，反映投資者風險偏好顯著改善。科技股及成長型股份表現領先，防禦性板塊相對落後，資金重新流入高貝塔值股票。那斯達克跑贏大盤的格局顯示，市場目前特別青睞具創新驅動力及高成長潛力的企業，入場情緒積極。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Risk-on sentiment describes a market state where investors feel confident enough to buy higher-risk assets — growth stocks, tech, and small caps — instead of hiding in bonds or cash. Today's NASDAQ outperforming the S&P 500 (+1.1% vs +0.6%) is a textbook sign: aggressive growth names lead when fear recedes. In a risk-on environment, sitting on idle cash means missing gains, which is why deploying into top momentum candidates makes sense today.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「風險偏好」（Risk-On）是指市場投資者信心充足，願意買入科技股、成長股等較高風險資產，而非躲入債券或現金的市場狀態。今日那斯達克跑贏大盤（+1.1% vs +0.6%），正是風險偏好升溫的教科書式訊號——恐慌退潮時，進取型成長股往往率先反彈領漲。在風險偏好模式下，持有閒置現金意味著錯失升勢，因此今日增持頂級動能股票是合理決策。
